title: How do I reset my forgotten Northeastern account password?
plain_text: Reset a forgotten Northeastern account password using Password Management. Go to Password Management, enter your Northeastern username, find your email addresses, send a reset email, open the reset link, complete MFA if prompted, enter a new password that meets Northeastern password requirements, and save the change. Password updates may take a few minutes to sync.

sections.heading: Reset your forgotten Northeastern password
sections.text: Use Password Management to send yourself a reset email, open the reset link, complete authentication if prompted, and choose a new password.
steps: Enter your Northeastern username, for example doe.j.
Select 'Send Reset Email' for the email address you want to use to receive the password reset link.
Check the inbox of the email account you selected.
Select the password reset link received via email.
Authenticate using multi-factor authentication (MFA). If you have lost access to Duo MFA, contact the IT Service Desk at 617.373.4357.
Enter a new password that meets the Northeastern account password requirements.
Select Save. You will see a confirmation message that the request has been processed. Password changes may take a few minutes to sync, so wait about 5 minutes before trying to log in again if needed.
